meetings.title: Executive Team Weekly
meetings.context: Weekly exec sync. Standing agenda: BU updates, decisions needed, cross-functional items.
meetings.prep_notes: JB wants hiring plan approval on the agenda. MK wants to raise London office capacity. EVM has the Santander acceleration request.
recent_threads: JB emailed Q2 hiring plan for approval (42 reqs, $12M)
MK raised London capacity at 94% — shortlist of 2 Canary Wharf options
EVM flagged Santander wants to accelerate Brazil-Mexico corridor to April

meetings.title: Board Pre-Call with DV
meetings.context: Informal pre-call ahead of March board meeting. DV had questions about ODL corridor targets and integration cost overages.
meetings.prep_notes: DV's email from yesterday asked two specific questions: (1) path to ODL corridor target, and (2) whether $15M integration overage is one-time. Have answers ready.
recent_threads: DV emailed March 9 re: Q1 preliminary results — wants ODL and integration cost clarity
Q1 results show 18 vs 20 target corridors; 2 delayed by regulatory timing
Integration costs: $15M over plan, driven by GTreasury cloud migration + Rail license transfers. Expected to normalize Q2.

meetings.title: AI Offsite — Executive Training
meetings.context: Company AI training offsite. Guided builds with Claude. Company meeting follows immediately after in the same room.
meetings.prep_notes: This is the session you're in right now. Focus on the builds and demos.

meetings.title: KKR — RLUSD Institutional Allocation
meetings.context: KKR interested in $50M RLUSD allocation. They want to discuss custodial arrangements and yield structure. IR team briefed.
meetings.prep_notes: KKR is one of the largest institutional players to express interest in RLUSD. This could be a marquee reference client. JB joining to handle financial structure questions.
recent_threads: KKR emailed March 8 expressing interest in $50M allocation
RLUSD market cap hit $1.52B — 85 institutional holders
Custody team confirming segregated account structure for institutional allocations

meetings.title: SBI Partnership Update
meetings.context: SBI wants to confirm Q2 launch timeline for RLUSD cross-border settlements in Japan. Their regulatory window closes June 30.
meetings.prep_notes: SBI has been Ripple's deepest institutional partner in Asia. This call is about confirming commitment to May launch. If we can't commit, they may explore USDC as a bridge currency.
recent_threads: SBI email March 7 asking for May launch commitment
RLUSD Japan integration at 70% — on track for May if no blockers
SBI also issued $65M on-chain bond on XRPL in Q1 — partnership deepening
